title: rhodiola rosea var. vulgaris
intro: Rhodiola rosea var. vulgaris, also known as Arctic root or golden root, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae and is native to the Arctic regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to adapt to stress, improve mental performance, and boost mood, due to its medicinal properties including adaptogenic and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rhodiola rosea var. vulgaris include reducing fatigue, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as enhancing cognitive function and memory. Rhodiola rosea var. vulgaris is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and can also be found in supplements and extracts.
